meaning: v.鑱斿悎缃插悕,杩炵讲淇濊瘉
examples: See CoSign info on part 11 compliance.
CoSign is used in over 100 Part 11 compliant installations.
Relatives who are doing well may be in a position to lend money, cosign a loan, or pay a few bills.
Without one, your adult child will have trouble renting an apartment or getting a loan unless you cosign, which is always a dangerous decision.
